query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_users,
  SUM(CASE WHEN id != 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as non_owner_count,
  MIN(CASE WHEN id != 1 THEN tokenVersion END) as min_tv,
  MAX(CASE WHEN id != 1 THEN tokenVersion END) as max_tv,
  (SELECT tokenVersion FROM app_users WHERE id = 1) as owner_tv
FROM app_users;
